name: Non-Daemon Foreground Output Flags

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Non-Daemon Foreground Output Flags is complete and correct

scope: Non-daemon stdout flags: wolfcastle start --foreground should not use --interleaved by default. It should accept the same flags as wolfcastle log (--thoughts, --interleaved, --json, default summary) and use the same default renderer (summary). The foreground output path lives in internal/daemon/start.go or cmd/daemon/start.go. See Item 2 from 2026-03-23T03:00:43Z inbox.
success_criteria: wolfcastle start (foreground) defaults to summary renderer, not interleaved
wolfcastle start accepts --thoughts, --interleaved, --json flags with last-wins semantics matching wolfcastle log
Log command design spec is updated to reflect summary as the non-daemon default
All modified code has >90% test coverage

breadcrumbs.text: Created 2 children: spec-update (leaf), foreground-renderer-flags (leaf). Ordering: spec-update first because the spec correction establishes the contract before implementation begins. The implementation leaf has 2 tasks: flag wiring + renderer dispatch, then tests. The change is contained to cmd/daemon/start.go, cmd/daemon/register.go, and the existing log-command-design spec. All renderer types (Summary, Thoughts, Interleaved, JSON) already exist in internal/logrender; no new renderers needed.
